summary: Cycle 1 complete. Literature synthesis done (METR, Anthropic harness, MIRROR, Ambig-SWE, LHAW). HongYang delivered 6 findings + 5 task designs. Key discovery: self-adversarial spec clarification is novel (vs Ambig-SWE/LHAW external dialogue). Golden and Matheus still working on failure taxonomy and experiment infrastructure.

dynamic_hooks.description: commit all cycle work before stopping

key_facts: METR Mar 2026: 50% of SWE-bench passing PRs wouldn't merge, 24.2pp gap
Ambig-SWE (ICLR 2026) uses external dialogue for ambiguity — recovers 80%
HongYang's self-adversarial spec clarification is INTERNAL (no oracle) — genuinely novel
H5: internal reflection recovers ≥60% of external dialogue benefit
MIRROR (IJCAI 2025): intra+inter reflection, 85.7% pass rate, 7% from intra-reflection
Anthropic harness: initializer+coding agent, feature reqs JSON, git-based state
Claude Agent SDK not yet installed — Matheus building infrastructure
5 diagnostic task designs: reliability stress, ghost exit, anchoring resistance, spec ambiguity, context injection paradox
3 students active: Golden (failure taxonomy), Matheus (infrastructure), HongYang (spec ambiguity test)
